recommendations.title: An Almost Ordinary Summer
recommendations.overview: Two families meet for a marriage that neither want, and things take a turn when the respective patriarchs fall in love.

recommendations.title: Cindy La Regia
recommendations.overview: When Cindy decides that she doesn't want to marry her boyfriend, she runs to Mexico City, where new friendships and unexpected paths teach her that there are so much more possibilities on her life and her talent than she imagines.

recommendations.title: The Love Witch
recommendations.overview: A modern-day witch uses spells and magic to get men to fall in love with her, with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: Happy Anniversary
recommendations.overview: A quirky couple spends their three-year dating anniversary looking back at their relationship and contemplating whether they should break up.

recommendations.title: Dou kyu sei – Classmates
recommendations.overview: Rihito Sajo, an honor student with a perfect score on the entrance exam and Hikaru Kusakabe, in a band and popular among girls, would have never crossed paths. Until one day they started talking at the practice for their school’s upcoming chorus fest

recommendations.title: Fast Times at Ridgemont High
recommendations.overview: Based on the real-life adventures chronicled by Cameron Crowe, Fast Times follows a group of high school students growing up in Southern California. Stacy Hamilton and Mark Ratner are looking for love, and are helped along by their older classmates,

recommendations.title: Nelly and Monsieur Arnaud

recommendations.title: Sex and the City
recommendations.overview: A New York writer on sex and love is finally getting married to her Mr. Big. But her three best girlfriends must console her after one of them inadvertently leads Mr. Big to jilt her.

recommendations.title: The Back-Up Plan

recommendations.title: Mr Malcolm's List
